name: titon-iptv-player
description: Windows desktop Xtream Codes IPTV player with native mpv playback

scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.build:win: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win --config builder.json && npm run verify:package
scripts.pack:portable: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win portable --config builder.json && npm run verify:package
